title: chrysanthemum schugnanicum
intro: Chrysanthemum schugnanicum is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its vibrant yellow petals and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum schugnanicum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum schugnanicum include infusions, decoctions, and capsules, which are often used to treat a range of conditions, from colds and flu to digestive issues and skin problems.
